file_insights.location: main() async fn, dispatcher command handler (~line 479-495)
file_insights.purpose: Pre-flight adapter existence check before dispatcher invocation

patterns_discovered.description: Validate adapter path existence before passing to downstream dispatcher system
patterns_discovered.benefit: Fail fast with clear messaging instead of silent dispatcher failure

patterns_discovered.description: Handle both absolute and relative adapter paths by checking is_absolute() and resolving relative paths to current_dir()
patterns_discovered.context: Adapter can be specified as absolute path or relative to working directory

patterns_discovered.description: Error message includes actionable hint ('ls adapters/*.nu') to guide user recovery
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces support burden; users self-service resolution

gotchas_discovered.description: Relative adapter paths must be resolved against std::env::current_dir(), not binary location
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without proper context, relative paths would fail mysteriously

gotchas_discovered.description: Error message hints at 'ls adapters/*.nu' as workaround, but no canonical 'list-adapters' subcommand exists yet
gotchas_discovered.impact: User guidance is shell-specific; doesn't reflect actual CLI capabilities

gotchas_discovered.description: Adapter parameter is String from CLI, must convert to PathBuf for exists() check and path operations
gotchas_discovered.impact: Type conversion required; easy to miss without explicit PathBuf handling

approach_outcome.completion: Implemented adapter validation with user-friendly error messaging

recommendations.rationale: Error message hints at listing adapters; formalize into CLI feature instead of shell workaround

recommendations.recommendation: Extract path resolution logic into helper function
recommendations.rationale: absolute/relative path logic could be reused elsewhere; reduces duplication

recommendations.recommendation: Add debug logging of resolved adapter path
recommendations.rationale: Aids troubleshooting when adapter exists but fails later; helpful for Nushell adapter detection

recommendations.recommendation: Consider validating adapter file is readable/executable
recommendations.rationale: exists() check succeeds but file may lack execute permissions; defer to adapter execution or add explicit check
